requirement_topic.en: TR CU 020/2011 EMC, IEC 61000 Evidence, and OCPP / Back-Office Interoperability
requirement_topic.zh: TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容、IEC 61000证据及OCPP/后台互操作
requirement_topic.zht: TR CU 020/2011電磁相容、IEC 61000證據及OCPP/後台互操作

summary.en: EV chargers with power electronics, controllers, RFID readers, modems, payment terminals, metering, and network interfaces may fall within EAEU TR CU 020/2011 EMC scope when placed on the Kyrgyzstan market. The technical file should address emissions, immunity, surge, conducted disturbance, radiated disturbance, harmonics, flicker, cable lengths, grounding, filters, and operating modes for the exact charger configuration. Separately, networked public or fleet chargers may need OCPP support and back-office integration where required by the charge-point operator, project owner, tender, or payment / monitoring system. OCPP is a project interoperability issue, while TR CU 020/2011 is a conformity issue; both may apply.
summary.zh: 带有电力电子、控制器、RFID读卡器、调制解调器、支付终端、计量和网络接口的电动汽车充电桩，在投放吉尔吉斯斯坦市场时可能落入EAEU TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容范围。技术文件应覆盖准确充电桩配置的发射、抗扰度、浪涌、传导骚扰、辐射骚扰、谐波、闪变、线缆长度、接地、滤波器和运行模式。另行地，联网公共或车队充电桩在充电点运营商、项目业主、招标或支付/监控系统要求时，可能需要OCPP支持和后台集成。OCPP是项目互操作问题，TR CU 020/2011是合格评定问题；两者可能同时适用。
summary.zht: 帶有電力電子、控制器、RFID讀卡器、數據機、支付終端、計量和網路接口的電動汽車充電樁，在投放吉爾吉斯斯坦市場時可能落入EAEU TR CU 020/2011電磁相容範圍。技術文件應覆蓋準確充電樁配置的發射、抗擾度、浪湧、傳導騷擾、輻射騷擾、諧波、閃變、線纜長度、接地、濾波器和運行模式。另行地，聯網公共或車隊充電樁在充電點運營商、項目業主、招標或支付/監控系統要求時，可能需要OCPP支持和後台集成。OCPP是項目互操作問題，TR CU 020/2011是合格評定問題；兩者可能同時適用。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
EAEU EAC marking and technical-file requirements for EMC-regulated products
IEC 61000 series EMC evidence where requested by the EAEU body, Kyrgyzstandart route, grid operator, or project owner
OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office communication
Project-specific CPO, payment, monitoring, or fleet-management integration requirements

summary.en: China charger dossiers may include GB/T 18487.1-2023 EMC clauses, GB/T 17626 series immunity evidence, CISPR / GB emission reports where used, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication evidence, and operator-specific platform records. GB/T 27930 is a charger-to-vehicle DC charging protocol and is not OCPP back-office interoperability. China EMC and platform evidence can support review but must be mapped to TR CU 020/2011, IEC 61000, and the exact Kyrgyzstan project integration requirement.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩资料可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023电磁兼容条款、GB/T 17626系列抗扰度证据、适用时的CISPR / GB发射报告、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信证据，以及运营商特定平台记录。GB/T 27930是充电桩到车辆的直流充电协议，不是OCPP后台互操作。中国EMC和平台证据可支持审查，但须映射至TR CU 020/2011、IEC 61000和准确的吉尔吉斯斯坦项目集成要求。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁資料可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023電磁相容條款、GB/T 17626系列抗擾度證據、適用時的CISPR / GB發射報告、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊證據，以及運營商特定平台記錄。GB/T 27930是充電樁到車輛的直流充電協議，不是OCPP後台互操作。中國EMC和平台證據可支持審查，但須映射至TR CU 020/2011、IEC 61000和準確的吉爾吉斯斯坦項目集成要求。

standards_or_laws: China charger-level EMC and platform test reports

gap.en: Map Chinese EMC reports to the EAEU route and retest if the final Kyrgyzstan SKU changes cable harness, enclosure, power module, modem, payment terminal, RFID reader, firmware, or operating mode. For networked chargers, confirm the OCPP version, security profile, SIM / modem bands, payment interface, data-hosting arrangement, remote diagnostics, and commissioning test required by the local operator or owner. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication should not be described as OCPP-ready.
gap.zh: 应将中国EMC报告映射至EAEU路径；若吉尔吉斯斯坦最终SKU在线束、外壳、功率模块、调制解调器、支付终端、RFID读卡器、固件或运行模式上改变，应补充测试。对联网充电桩，应确认当地运营商或业主要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM/调制解调器频段、支付接口、数据托管安排、远程诊断和调试测试。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩不应描述为OCPP-ready。
gap.zht: 應將中國EMC報告映射至EAEU路徑；若吉爾吉斯斯坦最終SKU在線束、外殼、功率模組、數據機、支付終端、RFID讀卡器、韌體或運行模式上改變，應補充測試。對聯網充電樁，應確認當地運營商或業主要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM/數據機頻段、支付接口、資料託管安排、遠程診斷和調試測試。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁不應描述為OCPP-ready。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger is within TR CU 020/2011 EMC scope and is placed on the Kyrgyzstan / EAEU market; OCPP is mandatory where required by tender, public-network operator, fleet owner, payment system, or monitoring platform
mandatory_status.cn: China EMC and GB/T 27930 evidence may be mandatory domestically but is not automatic EAEU EMC conformity or OCPP interoperability

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Kyrgyzstan, separate the EMC gate from the network-integration gate: TR CU 020/2011 / EAC may apply to the product, while OCPP and payment / monitoring integration are project requirements. GB/T 27930 is not OCPP.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向吉尔吉斯斯坦时，应区分EMC门槛和网络集成门槛：TR CU 020/2011 / EAC可能适用于产品，而OCPP及支付/监控集成属于项目要求。GB/T 27930不是OCPP。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向吉爾吉斯斯坦時，應區分EMC門檻和網絡集成門檻：TR CU 020/2011 / EAC可能適用於產品，而OCPP及支付/監控集成屬於項目要求。GB/T 27930不是OCPP。
